programme.title: The Way Home
programme.sub-title: Show Me the Way to Go Home
programme.desc: Alice is about to graduate high school; Kat and Elliot dream of the next steps for their relationship; Del realizes she will soon be an empty-nester again.

programme.title: To Philly with Love
programme.desc: A teacher and an archivist decode Revolutionary War-era love letters, taking them on a thrilling journey through Philadelphia where they uncover history and discover a love story of their own. Stars Rebecca Dalton, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's brother Clayton arrives from Atlanta with his boyfriend, Doug; Blanche claims to have accepted Clay's sexual orientation, but actually witnessing his lifestyle throws her a curve.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: When Miles admits to lying about his professional standing, Rose gives him the heave-ho.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: When Dorothy plans to remarry Stan, Sophia threatens to cut her off from the family.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While Dorothy makes wedding arrangements, the others interview potential housemate Truby.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia throws herself into her job as recreational director at a retirement home.

programme.desc: Blanche's brother Clayton arrives from Atlanta with his boyfriend, Doug; Blanche claims to have accepted Clay's sexual orientation, but actually witnessing his lifestyle throws her a curve.

programme.desc: While Dorothy makes wedding arrangements, the others interview potential housemate Truby.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia throws herself into her job as recreational director at a retirement home.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Over Brock and Barbra Jean's objections, Reba gives Kyra permission to go on her first date, then discovers the boy is 17 years old.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne suspects Van of cheating on her with a sexy publicist and kicks him out of the house.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Embarrassed about living with his mother-in-law, Van tries to pass Reba off as his maid; Brock tells Reba and Barbara Jean he wants to pursue his dream of golfing professionally.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne is upset when Van decides to shave his head for the team; Barbra Jean convinces Reba to go into business with her.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra punches a classmate who attacked her sister's reputation; Van helps Jake build a volcano for the science fair.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Everyone panics when Kyra disappears in the middle of the night; Van and Cheyenne appear on a cable sports show.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbara Jean arranges a blind date for reluctant Reba; Van uses his bonus to buy a new sports car without consulting Cheyenne.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Trying to be more wild, Reba takes Van's new sports car for a joy ride and accidntally ends up scratching it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose auditions for a TV reporter job; Blanche seeks a commitment from a lukewarm beau.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche robs the cradle to convince Jason, her new lover, how young she is.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A suspicious Rose asks neighbor Barbara Weston to investigate her new boyfriend, at the same time that Miles returns to her life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: Long ago antics by Sophia come to light when Dorothy's high-school prom date appears.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: The Lorelais' First Day at Yale
programme.desc: Lorelai helps her daughter move into the dormitory at Yale, where Rory meets a strange new roommate and encounters an old adversary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: The Hobbit, the Sofa and Digger Stiles
programme.desc: Rory is shocked to discover that Emily has redecorated her dorm room without permission; Richard announces that he is taking on a new business partner (Chris Eigeman).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Dean awkwardly invites Rory to his wedding the next day; Dean confesses to Luke how much he misses Rory; Lorelai and Sookie have trouble obtaining a permit to begin construction on the inn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Because of Cupid
programme.desc: Best friends Naomi and Marcus participate in a Valentine's Day mocktail competition but things go awry when Cupid interferes with a love potion that affects Marcus and several of their friends.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: A woman tries to win over a handsome local after entering a world-renowned matchmaking festival in Ireland.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love of the Irish
programme.desc: Tired of bad luck, Fiona takes her mother on a trip to Ireland to turn things around. She soon meets a charming single father who helps her make her own luck.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home: Part 1
programme.desc: Sophia becomes the prime suspect in the investigation surrounding a fire at Shady Pines retirement home.

programme.desc: John-Boy struggles with his beliefs about killing but proves his courage on a turkey hunt with his father.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy's sisters unknowingly sell a museum-piece typewriter he borrowed from the Baldwins to a junkman.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandpa interprets a shooting star that crash-landed at the Baldwins as an omen of his death.

programme.desc: Trying to be more wild, Reba takes Van's new sports car for a joy ride and accidntally ends up scratching it.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean comes to Reba for advice when she suspects that Brock is cheating on her; Kyra's boyfriend breaks her heart.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Tensions between Reba and Barbra Jean lead to a bar brawl when they have a girls' night out to celebrate Cheyenne's birthday.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean enlists Reba's help to break the news to Brock that she wants another baby, but the situation backfires when Barbra Jean catches Reba and Brock in a romantic embrace.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is put in the middle of Brock and Barbara Jean's marital troubles when Barbara Jean considers a divorce and claims Reba is her inspiration.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Hoping for a reconciliation, Stan buys a date with Dorothy at a charity auction.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The ladies must take the stage in the school play when Dorothy's first-graders come down with the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: An old photo shows Blanche with Charlie; Sophia has a hearing test.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: Blanche becomes the prime suspect when the roommates go on a murder mystery weekend.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory goes on her first date since breaking up with Jess; Lorelai invites Luke over to watch a movie; Lorelai is dismayed to learn that the designer she hired for the inn used to work for Emily.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Emily hires Lorelai and Sookie to cater a business affair, then makes them jump through hoops; sparks fly between Lorelai and Richard's new partner (Chris Eigeman); Rory hunts for a suitable place to study.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: When the townspeople stage famous paintings, Rory portrays a young woman in a Renaissance work, Lorelai appears as the beauty in Renoir's "Dance at Bougival," and Kirk embodies Jesus in Da Vinci's "The Last Supper.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Double Scoop
programme.desc: Nora discovers the best ice cream and hopes to land them as a client. Her sweet dreams hit a snag when her former colleague James has the same idea. Old sparks begin to melt the frosty tension. Stars Taylor Cole, Ryan McPartlin.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: While consoling each other over the recent loss of their spouses, a man (Warren Christie) and a woman (Lacey Chabert) grow close and fall in love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: A marketing executive reconnects with her high school boyfriend after becoming the unexpected guardian of her niece and nephew.

programme.title: Always Amore
programme.desc: Struggling to keep her late husband's Italian restaurant afloat, a woman agrees to work with a professional consultant to see if they can turn things around. At first, she's resistant, but as they get closer, she realizes not all change is bad.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While on a wheelchair, Sophia manipulates a nurse; Blanche is a stage grandmother.
